creator: freebsd@oldach.net
text:
Created attachment 254503
Revised patch, installing DB in /var/db/rkhunter

(In reply to Zsolt Udvari from comment #7)
OK, that triggered me to consider that creating a fresh /var/lib tree is not optimal and we should better install DB files in /var/db/rkhunter instead, following the conventions of many other ports. Likewise, move TMPDIR to /var/db/rkhunter/tmp.
